Title: A Christmas Gift
Cast: Elma Mbadiwe, Daniel Abua, Ayo Adesanya, Ray Adeka
Synopsis: In A Christmas Gift, we dive into the captivating story of Nelson and Morayo, two strangers brought together by the heartfelt wishes of a beloved grandmother. Set against the colorful backdrop of a Nigerian community, this touching Nollywood drama explores themes of love, redemption, and the power of self-discovery.

Title: A Christmas Love Story
Synopsis: ,A CHRISTMAS LOVE STORY' is a heartwarming tale of love, friendship, family, kindness and redemption.

Title: A Christmas Miracle
Cast: Enyinna Nwigwe, Emma Ayalogu, Shammah Agah
Synopsis: A Merry Christmas Miracle is a must-watch for anyone craving an engaging storyline filled with excitement and holiday magic.

Title: A Christmas Thrill
Synopsis: Kora hides her feelings for her boss and goes home to spend the Christmas holidays with her family, only to find surprises waiting for her.
